name: mnemex-autocomplete
description: Inline code completion powered by mnemex semantic context + local/cloud LLMs

mnemexAutocomplete.debounceMs.description: Debounce time for automatic inline completions.

mnemexAutocomplete.maxPrefixChars.description: Max characters before cursor to send to the server.

mnemexAutocomplete.maxSuffixChars.description: Max characters after cursor to send to the server.

mnemexAutocomplete.maxTokens.description: Max tokens for the completion model.

mnemexAutocomplete.llmProvider.description: Override LLM provider for completions (openrouter | local | anthropic | claude-code). Empty = use mnemex config/env.

mnemexAutocomplete.llmModel.description: Override LLM model for completions. Empty = use mnemex config/env.

mnemexAutocomplete.llmEndpoint.description: Override local LLM endpoint (OpenAI-compatible), e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 or LM Studio http://localhost:1234/v1.
